title: MelinaKlostermann/Niedner_et_al_2024: Zenodo release
author: Melina Klostermann
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Complementary code to Niedner-Boblenz (2024): Intrinsically disordered RNA-binding motifs cooperate to catalyze RNA folding and drive phase separation. 
 This code contains the bioinformatic analyses to define PUN proteins globally in 5 different Organisms. Code is ordered by organism.
steps_raw:
Complementary code to Niedner-Boblenz (2024): Intrinsically disordered RNA-binding motifs cooperate to catalyze RNA folding and drive phase separation.
